title: prunus × furuseana
intro: Prunus × furuseana, also known as Prunus furuseana, is a hybrid cherry tree derived from the Japanese flowering cherry (Prunus x yoshinoensis) and the Japanese hill cherry (Prunus fruticosa). The bark, leaves, and flowers of this plant are used in traditional medicine, which has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Prunus × furuseana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into a tincture, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
